# IronTrack

> Train heavier, live lighter. A Belgian fitness web app that tracks strength training, cardio, nutrition, progress, and training partners — built as an editorial, brutalist workshop notebook. Free forever tier, privacy-first, GDPR-compliant.

IronTrack is a Next.js 16 / Supabase / Vercel application available in French (default), Dutch and English. It is designed for serious lifters and runners who want precision without gamification noise. Developed in Belgium, it uses the metric system natively and integrates with Belgian retailer product data.

## Core features

- Strength training sessions with live logging (weight, reps, RIR, tempo) and historical volume analytics
- Cardio sessions with advanced metrics (stroke rate SPM, watts, heart rate BPM, incline, cadence RPM, resistance) adapted to Belgian equipment conventions
- Exercise library with custom creation wizard, AI-assisted suggestions, duplicate detection, and muscle-group / equipment taxonomy
- Nutrition tracker with Open Food Facts integration (Belgian retailers: Colruyt, Delhaize, Carrefour, Lidl), Nutri-Score display, barcode scanning via Web BarcodeDetector API, and macro targets
- Progress dashboards with personal records, progression charts, and trend detection (improving / stable / declining)
- Training partners with realtime shared sessions and nutrition visibility via Supabase Realtime
- Admin panel with site health monitoring, bidirectional support tickets, user management, security audits, and GDPR exports
- Multilingual routing (FR default / NL / EN) with hreflang alternates
- PWA with offline support, installable on iOS and Android

## Tech stack

- Framework: Next.js 16 App Router, React 19, TypeScript strict
- Styling: Tailwind CSS v4 (CSS-first @theme tokens), shadcn/ui new-york, Fraunces / Manrope / JetBrains Mono typography
- Backend: Supabase (Postgres with RLS, Realtime, Storage, Auth SSR)
- Deployment: Vercel with Fluid Compute on Node 22 LTS
- AI: Vercel AI SDK v6 + AI Gateway (Gemini 2.0 Flash free tier)
- Observability: Sentry + Vercel Analytics
- i18n: next-intl v3 with middleware-based locale routing

## Documentation

- Homepage: https://iron-track-dusky.vercel.app
- Repository: https://github.com/thierryvm/IronTrack
- Privacy policy: /fr/legal/privacy
- Terms of service: /fr/legal/terms

## Principles

- Zero paid dependency in runtime — every external service has a meaningful free tier
- GDPR-compliant by design (Belgian user base, data residency in EU)
- Accessibility: WCAG 2.2 AA minimum on all interactive surfaces
- Lighthouse target: 100 across Performance, Accessibility, Best Practices and SEO
- Editorial-brutalist design language, opinionated and distinctive
- No dark patterns, no streak anxiety, no forced gamification
